landing_hero_title: Your characters. Your chats. Your rules.
landing_hero_subtitle: Charshare is a decentralized platform for AI characters. No account required, no moderation queue, no subscription. Everything lives on your device first — publish to the network only if you want to.
landing_strength_no_account_body: Generate a local identity and start creating characters and chatting immediately. Publishing to the network is optional, and only your choice.
landing_strength_your_data_body: Chats, personas, and preferences never leave your device — no server of ours ever sees them. You also pick your own AI provider, so even the messages you send to generate a reply go straight to a service you chose, not one we run.
landing_strength_ungovernable_body: No company, no terms of service, no moderation queue. Nobody has the power to tell you what characters you can write, ban your account, or take away your access — because there's no server, and no one, in a position to.
landing_strength_free_body: Charshare is AGPLv3 software you run and own a copy of. Modify it, fork it, self-host a relay — the code you can read is the whole product.
landing_install_body_before: Run Charshare as a desktop app, or just use it in your browser at
landing_install_body_after: above — no install required either way.
landing_download_binary_body: Prebuilt desktop binaries for Linux, macOS, and Windows are published on GitHub Releases.
landing_nix_body: If you have Nix with flakes enabled, you can run Charshare without installing anything:
landing_getting_started_body: Charshare works with several AI providers — pick whichever fits how you want to run it.
landing_provider_huggingface_step1: Create a Hugging Face account and generate an access token with inference permissions.
landing_provider_huggingface_step2: In Charshare Settings → AI tab, select "Hugging Face" and paste in your token.
landing_provider_huggingface_step3: Enter the model id you want to use for inference.
landing_provider_huggingface_step4: Start chatting — calls go directly from your browser to Hugging Face's inference API.
landing_provider_openrouter_step1: Create an account at openrouter.ai and generate an API key.
landing_provider_openrouter_step2: In Charshare, open Settings (your avatar, top right) → AI tab.
landing_provider_openrouter_step3: Select "OpenRouter" as the provider and paste in your API key.
landing_provider_openrouter_step4: Enter a model id, e.g. openai/gpt-4o or any model listed on OpenRouter.
landing_provider_openrouter_step5: Start chatting — requests go straight from your browser to OpenRouter; your key never leaves your device.
landing_provider_ollama_step1: Install Ollama on your own machine (or a server you control) and pull a model, e.g. ollama pull llama3.
landing_provider_ollama_step2: Make sure Ollama is running and reachable — by default at http://localhost:11434.
landing_provider_ollama_step3: In Charshare Settings → AI tab, select "Ollama" and enter the server URL.
landing_provider_ollama_step4: Enter the model name you pulled.
landing_provider_ollama_step5: No API key needed — the model runs entirely on hardware you control.
landing_tech_architecture_body: Charshare has no server component at all — download it as a desktop app, or run the exact same code as a static site deployed from any CDN. Anything you publish travels over Nostr, an open protocol, through relays that anyone can run. When you chat, your device talks directly to whichever AI provider you've configured — there's no proxy of ours in between.
landing_tech_identity_body: Every user and character is identified by a public key, not a separate username or database row. Every event is signed per the Nostr protocol (secp256k1); peers verify signatures client-side before trusting anything. That signature is cryptographic proof of ownership — only the holder of the private key can publish an edit, so authorship can't be forged or reassigned by anyone else, including a relay. There's no password to leak, because there's no password.
landing_tech_selfhost_body: Sensible default relays are provided, but every relay is user-configurable and self-hostable. Nothing about using Charshare requires trusting a relay you didn't choose — data is signed and verified independent of which relay carried it.
landing_tech_license_body: Charshare is licensed AGPLv3: free to run, study, modify, and redistribute. It's built and shipped as software you own a copy of — as a desktop binary or a static site you host yourself — not a service you rent. There is no subscription, and there's nothing to cancel.
landing_how_it_works_body: A closer look at how Charshare works under the hood.
landing_support_body: Charshare has no subscription and no ads, and never will. If you'd like to support it anyway, donations are welcome via Monero.
legal_software_not_service_heading: Charshare is software, not a service
legal_software_not_service_body: Charshare is not a service we operate. It's software you can download and run locally — the same code runs entirely on your device. We don't run a backend, don't host a database of user content, and don't have any account system of our own to moderate. Anything you choose to publish is sent directly to the Nostr network, through relays that anyone (including you) can run.
legal_no_moderation_heading: We have no ability to moderate or remove content
legal_no_moderation_body: Because there is no central server, we have no technical ability to review, approve, take down, or otherwise control what any user publishes to the network, and no account system through which to ban anyone. Local blocking tools (blocked tags, blocked authors, hidden characters) exist for your own client, but they don't remove anything from the network — they only affect what your own client shows you.
legal_your_responsibility_heading: You are responsible for what you publish
legal_your_responsibility_body: If you publish a character, comment, or profile to the network, you are solely responsible for that content and for complying with the laws that apply to you in your jurisdiction. We do not review, endorse, or take responsibility for content published by any user, including you.
legal_third_party_body: Charshare does not run or proxy any AI model. You configure your own AI provider (e.g. OpenRouter, Hugging Face, or a self-hosted Ollama instance) and your own credentials. When you chat, requests go directly from your device to the provider you chose — any data sent that way is governed by that provider's own terms and privacy practices, not by us.
legal_no_warranty_body_after: , which provides the software "as is," without warranty of any kind, and disclaims liability to the fullest extent permitted by law. That disclaimer applies here too — use Charshare at your own risk.
chats_empty_state: Select a conversation, or start one from a character's page.
char_list_filter_all_tooltip: Show everything: your own characters, ones you've saved, and results from the network.
char_list_mine_only_tooltip: Only characters authored by you, whether local-only drafts or already published.
char_list_saved_only_tooltip: Only characters you've explicitly saved (starred) or that were auto-saved by starting a chat with them.
char_list_filter_published_tooltip: Only your own characters that are published to the network — hides your unpublished local-only drafts.
char_list_filter_network_tooltip: Only characters from other authors that you haven't saved.
char_list_empty_mine: You haven't created any characters yet.
char_import_json_formats: Supports Charshare's own JSON export, a raw TavernAI/SillyTavern character-card JSON, or a TavernAI character-card PNG.
char_detail_republish_confirm_message: Re-sends this character's current signed snapshot to your configured relay(s).
char_detail_republish_restore_confirm_me: Brings this character back from "deleted on remote" — it becomes visible and discoverable on the network again, under the same id.
char_detail_keep_published_hint: Automatically republishes this character whenever it's missing from your configured relay(s) — checked on app start and after other character changes in this browser, so you don't have to notice and press Republish yourself.
char_detail_delete_confirm_message_local: This character was never published — this removes it from this device for good.
char_detail_delete_confirm_message_publi: It's been published, so peers who already synced it can keep their copy either way. Choose whether to also remove it from this device, or keep a local copy you can restore later under the same id.
char_detail_unsave_deleted_confirm_messa: It's been deleted on remote — your saved copy is the only place it still exists. Removing it here is permanent; there's nothing left to re-fetch from the network afterward.
char_detail_unsave_unreachable_confirm_m: It's not reachable on any relay right now — your saved copy may be the only place it still exists. Removing it here is permanent; there may be nothing left to re-fetch from the network afterward.
char_detail_local_only_no_comments: Local-only characters can't have comments — publish this character to enable them.
char_detail_account_needed_notice: You'll need an account to post — click "Post comment" to create one.
char_detail_edited_title: Edited by the comment's author on {time}
char_detail_comment_delete_message: Request deletion of this comment? Comments can't be edited or un-sent — this asks relays to remove it, but some may still show it.
char_detail_comment_delete_requested: Deletion requested — may still appear on some relays
char_detail_hide_tooltip_hidden: Only visible to you locally — unhide to stop hiding it
char_detail_hide_tooltip_visible: Hide this comment locally, for you only
char_detail_comments_disabled: Comments are disabled for this character.
my_comments_empty: You haven't posted any comments yet.
my_comments_delete_message: Request deletion of this comment? Comments can't be edited or un-sent — this asks relays to remove it, but some may still show it.
my_comments_delete_requested: Deletion requested — may still appear on some relays
my_comments_signed_in_required: Sign in to see the comments you've posted.
chat_composer_placeholder: Message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)
chat_composer_token_usage_hint: Estimated tokens the AI would receive right now (system prompt + history + draft), against the active provider's configured context size. If a request would overflow this, the oldest history is trimmed automatically when sending — never what's shown here in the chat.
chat_composer_mic_consent_message: The first time you use this, a speech-recognition model (about {sizeMB}MB) downloads and is cached in your browser. All transcription then runs entirely on your device — your voice recording is never sent anywhere. You can change the model size in Settings.
chat_bubble_tts_consent_message: The first time you use this, a text-to-speech model (about {sizeMB}MB) downloads and is cached in your browser. All speech synthesis then runs entirely on your device — the message text is never sent anywhere. You can change the provider in Settings.
chat_edit_switch_message: You have unsaved changes to another message.
chat_recovery_error_heading: This chat's character couldn't be loaded
chat_recovery_manual_heading: Choose a character for this chat
chat_recovery_manual_body: Switches this conversation to a different character.
chat_recovery_search_placeholder: Search your characters, or the network by name/tag…
chat_sidebar_share_link_failed: Couldn't copy the link — here it is to copy manually:
chat_sidebar_delete_message: Delete conversation "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
shared_chat_not_found: This link doesn't contain a valid shared conversation.
chat_site_import_heading: Import a character you're chatting with elsewhere
chat_site_import_step1: Open the character's chat on the other site.
chat_site_import_step2_before: Find its setting for a custom AI/API proxy (sometimes called "Custom API", "Reverse Proxy", or "API endpoint"), and set the address to:
chat_site_import_step3: Send any message in that chat (even just "hi").
chat_site_import_step4: Come back to this window — it will fill in the character's info automatically and close on its own.
chat_site_import_no_request_error: That didn't look like a character chat — try sending a message again.
char_form_tag_guidelines_hyphens: Use hyphens instead of spaces, e.g.
char_form_tag_guidelines_pick: Pick from the suggestions where possible so the same concept isn't spelled differently across characters.
char_form_slideshow_enabled_label: Slideshow — cycle through images on hover (card view)
char_form_keep_local_only_label: Keep local-only (not published to the network — no comments, only visible to you)
char_form_guest_notice_before: You're browsing as a guest, so new characters stay local-only.
char_form_description_placeholder: Who is this character? Appearance, background, notable traits…
char_form_image_urls_body: Links to images hosted elsewhere only (e.g.
char_form_image_urls_body_after: ) — there's no upload; the character record is small text data that's copied to every peer on the network, so images have to stay externally hosted.
char_form_personality_placeholder: How do they act, speak, and think? e.g. blunt, secretly caring, quick to anger… Include character appearance too.
char_form_scenario_placeholder: The setting or situation the chat starts in…
char_form_system_prompt_body: Leave blank to use the default roleplay instructions. Only set this to override that default, e.g.:
char_form_system_prompt_placeholder: Instructions sent to the AI describing how to roleplay this character…
char_form_error_image_url: Image URLs must link to an image hosted elsewhere (starting with http:// or https://) — got "{url}"
char_form_error_too_large: Character data is too large ({actualKb}KB, limit {limitKb}KB). Trim down the description, dialogues, or greetings.
char_form_error_system_tag: "{tag}" is a reserved system tag and can't be used here.
char_form_unsaved_changes_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page anyway?
account_tab_guest_body: Talking to characters, chats, personas and preferences all work locally without an account. Create an account only if you want to publish characters or post comments — it's not required otherwise.
account_tab_publish_backup_notice: Account created! Back up your account now — if you lose local storage without a backup, this account can't be recovered.
account_tab_have_account_body: Select a backup file to sign in with an existing account on this browser.
account_tab_backup_body: Download a file that lets you use this account on another device or browser.
account_tab_switch_body: Select a backup file to switch this browser to that account. Keep this file safe — it's the only way to access your account, and it can't be recovered if lost.
account_tab_logout_body: Switches this browser back to a fresh guest identity. Make sure you've downloaded a backup first — there's no other way to get back into this account.
account_tab_logout_confirm: Log out of this account? Make sure you have downloaded a backup first — there is no way to recover this account without it.
general_tab_devtools_hint: Opens the webview's developer tools window for debugging.
general_tab_theme_tip: Tip: use the ← → arrow keys to switch themes.
general_tab_default_background_hint: Applied to new chats automatically when set. Leave empty for no default.
general_tab_opacity_hint: Fades chat bubbles and the composer so a chat background shows through.
general_tab_mic_silence_hint: When enabled, recording stops automatically after you go quiet for this long. Disable to always stop manually.
general_tab_whisper_model_hint: Larger models transcribe more accurately but take longer to download and run.
sound_tab_tts_intro: Provider, voice, and pitch are chosen per chat — see a chat's own settings (⚙) to set them up.
sound_tab_tts_auto_hint: Only applies to chats where read-aloud is enabled — doesn't trigger the download-consent prompt on its own.
sound_tab_tts_voicevox_url_hint: Point this at a VOICEVOX Engine (https://voicevox.hiroshiba.jp/) running on your own machine — this app doesn't download or bundle VOICEVOX itself.
sound_tab_tts_model_hint: Downloaded once, then reused offline for every message you read aloud.
sound_tab_tts_preview_text: Hello! This is what the local voice sounds like.
ai_tab_ollama_hint: Local or self-hosted Ollama instance. No API key needed.
ai_tab_openai_compatible_url_hint: Any server exposing an OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions endpoint — a self-hosted proxy, a third-party API, a local inference server.
ai_tab_openai_compatible_key_hint: Leave blank if your server doesn't require one. Stored locally only, never published.
ai_tab_tos_agree_button: I agree to {provider}'s Terms of Service
personas_tab_body: Masks you can wear while chatting with characters. Personas are stored only in this browser — they're never published.
data_tab_local_heading: Your data stays on this device
data_tab_local_body: Chats, personas, and local-only (unpublished) characters are never sent over the network — this browser is the only copy. Back them up here if you don't want to risk losing them.
data_tab_download_hint: One category downloads as a single JSON file; multiple categories are bundled into a zip.
data_tab_import_body: Select a file exported from here — a single category's JSON, or a zip bundle of several. Imported characters come in as local-only drafts; imported personas and chats are added alongside what you already have.
data_category_account_description: Your private key — treat this like a password.
data_category_characters_description: Local-only drafts and characters you've published, together.
data_category_savedCharacters_descriptio: Other authors' characters you've kept as a local backup.
data_category_preferences_description: Theme, blocked tags, AI provider settings — including any API keys you've entered.
data_export_error_not_valid_saved_charac: Not a valid saved characters export.
data_export_error_unknown_category: {filename}: couldn't tell what kind of data this is.
network_tab_relays_label: Nostr relays (one per line, e.g. wss://relay.example)
network_tab_own_relays_hint: Published to the network so other clients following the outbox model know where to find your characters, comments, and profile.
network_tab_own_relays_signin_required: Create an account to publish your own relay list.
network_tab_hint: Takes effect the next time the app loads.
content_tab_blocked_tags_hint: Characters carrying any of these tags are excluded from Browse.
content_tab_blocked_authors_hint: Characters published by these authors are excluded from Browse. Local to this browser only — you can also block an author directly from their character's card.
chats_restore_conflict_message: A chat named "{name}" already exists with different content. Replace it with the imported version?
characters_restore_conflict_message: "{name}" already exists locally at the same version with different content. Replace it with the imported version?
personas_restore_conflict_message: A persona named "{name}" already exists with different content. Replace it with the imported version?
